# Billing Policy

When a customer reports a payment problem, support should first identify whether
the issue is an authorization failure, a duplicate charge, a delayed receipt, or
a missing invoice.

If funds were captured but the account still shows an unpaid balance, finance
should compare the payment processor event with the billing ledger. The customer
should receive a clear update before any subscription access is changed.

This policy intentionally discusses payment issues and billing flow without
using the exact phrase in every possible customer query.
